name: Sites
description: Physical incubator sites operated by the UCF Business Incubation Program. Used as the tenancy anchor: staff are assigned to sites via StaffAssignments, and clients/program data will be scoped to sites in later milestones.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: currentOccupancy
columns.description: Current number of clients occupying the site

columns.name: totalCapacity
columns.description: Total client capacity of the site
